title: Airbnb (ABNB) Q1 2025 Earnings Preview: Key Metrics and Analyst Expectations
text: Airbnb is scheduled to report Q1 2025 earnings on May 7. Wall Street anticipates earnings of $0.30 per share (a 25% year-over-year increase) and revenue of $2.62 billion (15.4% annual growth). Options markets suggest approximately 7.85% stock volatility following the announcement. The company demonstrated strong momentum in Q4, with revenue climbing 12% annually to $2.8 billion and gross booking value expanding 16% to $20.4 billion. Analysts project Q1 nights and experiences booked at 156 million units, up from 143 million in the prior year. Oppenheimer initiated Outperform coverage with a $180 price target, citing hotel expansion opportunities, AI search improvements, and World Cup demand as growth catalysts. UBS maintained a Neutral rating at $153 target, expressing concern that Middle East geopolitical tensions will create more pronounced headwinds for consumer sentiment in upcoming quarters. According to TipRanks, ABNB holds a Moderate Buy rating with an average price target of $151.75, suggesting roughly 9.28% upside potential.
